ipeds_hd2023.name: Institutional Characteristics (HD2023)
ipeds_hd2023.provider: IPEDS / NCES, U.S. Department of Education
ipeds_hd2023.description: Campus name, city, state, coordinates, sector, locale code, highest level of offering

ipeds_effy2023.name: 12-Month Enrollment (EFFY2023)
ipeds_effy2023.provider: IPEDS / NCES, U.S. Department of Education

census_cd118.name: Congressional District Boundaries (CD118)
census_cd118.description: 118th Congress cartographic boundary shapefiles, coast-clipped, 1:500k resolution

npsas20.name: Student-to-Campus Distance (NPSAS:20)
npsas20.description: 75th-percentile student-to-campus crow-flies distance by NCES locale code (retrieval code: swopse)

cook_pvi_2024.name: Cook Partisan Voter Index
cook_pvi_2024.description: Partisan lean of each congressional district based on the two most recent presidential elections

house_members_119.name: U.S. House Representatives (119th Congress)
house_members_119.provider: Office of the Clerk, U.S. House of Representatives
house_members_119.description: Current representative name and party affiliation for each congressional district

acs5_2023_b19013.name: Median Household Income (B19013)
acs5_2023_b19013.provider: U.S. Census Bureau, American Community Survey 5-Year Estimates
acs5_2023_b19013.description: Median household income in the past 12 months, inflation-adjusted to survey-year dollars

acs5_2023_b17001.name: Poverty Status (B17001)
acs5_2023_b17001.provider: U.S. Census Bureau, American Community Survey 5-Year Estimates
acs5_2023_b17001.description: Poverty rate computed as population below poverty level / total population for whom poverty status is determined

acs5_2023_b15003.name: Educational Attainment (B15003)
acs5_2023_b15003.provider: U.S. Census Bureau, American Community Survey 5-Year Estimates
acs5_2023_b15003.description: Percentage of population 25+ with an associate's degree or higher

acs5_2023_b01001.name: Age Distribution (B01001)
acs5_2023_b01001.provider: U.S. Census Bureau, American Community Survey 5-Year Estimates

derived_campus_aggregation.name: Derived: Aggregated from Campuses Tab
derived_campus_aggregation.description: Sum or count aggregated across all community college campuses in each state. Campus enrollment from IPEDS EFFY2023; district reach from Census CD118 intersection analysis.

us_elections_project_2022.name: 2022 Midterm Voter Turnout
us_elections_project_2022.provider: United States Elections Project / UF Election Lab
us_elections_project_2022.description: Voting Eligible Population (VEP) turnout rate for the 2022 midterm elections by state

senate_gov_119.name: U.S. Senators (119th Congress)
senate_gov_119.description: Senator name, party, next election year, last election margin, and tax-relevant committee assignments

accountable_50state_eitc.name: EITC & Federal Tax Statistics
accountable_50state_eitc.provider: Accountable 50-State Analysis v43.6 (compiled from IRS Statistics of Income)
accountable_50state_eitc.description: State-level EITC claims, participation rates, unclaimed rates, total filers, and total federal tax paid

accountable_50state_pop.name: Adult Population & Urbanization
accountable_50state_pop.provider: Accountable 50-State Analysis v43.6 (compiled from U.S. Census Bureau)
accountable_50state_pop.description: State-level adult population (18+) and urban population percentage
